manifest_rows.rationale: Industrial-automation and robotics-heavy leader intended to stress a theme-loaded narrow sector where turnover can concentrate in a few active names.
AI-compute server name intended to reinforce concentrated turnover inside a narrower high-theme technology lane.
Power-and-electronics linkage intended to add another high-theme narrow-sector case that can crowd into a small set of liquid names.
Large brokerage anchor intended to represent a theme-light but still narrow financial sector where turnover is active without being dominated by a single symbol.
Chemical-sector quality leader intended to add a theme-light narrow-sector case with steadier, more balanced turnover.
Coal-sector large cap intended to stress balanced-turnover behavior inside a theme-light narrow cyclical sector.
AI-software platform name intended to add a broad-sector case where theme load is present but not extreme while turnover can still concentrate.
Security-and-electronics leader intended to represent a broader technology sector with moderate theme linkage and concentrated attention.
Healthcare large-cap leader intended to add a non-technology broad-sector case with moderate theme loading and concentrated turnover.

interpretation: The next suspect batch should be designed, not just enlarged.
A good seed manifest should add only new symbols versus market_research_v1 while explicitly covering the targeted missing archetypes.
This audit is a design-quality gate before any free-data bootstrap is attempted.
